text: The name of my God is "YHWH" or "Jehovah," and I am G-d, who was and will be; He created me. The book I wrote (written by Horselover Fat) entitled VALIS is a history of the universe, from its origin to this present day—a record of what I have done: of all my deeds in creating it, and of our struggle together against the Empire: the Empire which wants to destroy us both—us two, me and you and your wife. The Empire has an army with which they intend to crush us out of existence; but they do not know that I have already defeated them on this day (13-14 February 1974), by my having "risen again" in my crucified body; it is my rebirth, and as G-d I am immortal. So when the Empire comes to destroy us—me and you, and your wife—but especially me—I shall simply vanish from sight for a time (until they are defeated) and then return as new (resurrected).

prompt: What is the Black Iron Prison?
text: The Black Iron Prison is what I see and feel. The prison is around us all; we can't see it but we are inside of it ... we're like ants or worms who dig little tunnels into a huge mass of dead stuff.

prompt: What did the pink light show you?
text: We can see into the heart of things. In my case it's the heart of my own mind. I see the secrets that my brain conceals from me; I have, now, knowledge which will be with me throughout eternity and the universe—e.g., the answer to all questions about myself: who I am and what I'm doing. For instance, this: I am not myself at all; I am my own simulacrum, or even better, a hologram. I can't prove that except (1) by its knowing me in secret so well—so as if it has been seeing me inside for a very long time—and (2) because of the "I" in me: its own self-reference. But there is also another, better, proof, which consists in the fact that I have seen myself doing things—in that other world of the pink light—which I could not possibly do in this one. It's not even an example of a double life; it isn't even my own double; it has a different knowledge than mine and so is another person entirely. I only knew about my own double, like Dick did with Eldritch. This was totally separate

"Of course it did. Time, motion and the past (as we remember it) are only illusory. What appeared to be a world passed from the past into the future; but all that really existed was this present time. The past had no reality at all except in our minds; it never did exist."1

prompt: Is God hiding in the trash of the gutter?
text: "Sure. I’ve seen him there myself and not just seen but sensed and felt; he has an odor, like that of a dead body or a dog’s mouth . . ."
